options.blogdescription: A live WordPress Playground preview for Donation Manager.

steps.code:
true ) ); update_option( 'woocommerce_task_list_hidden', 'yes' ); update_option( 'woocommerce_allow_tracking', 'no' ); update_option( 'woocommerce_store_address', '123 Preview Street' ); update_option( 'woocommerce_store_city', 'Playground' ); update_option( 'woocommerce_default_country', 'US:CA' ); update_option( 'woocommerce_currency', 'USD' ); update_option( 'woocommerce_product_type', 'both' ); update_option( 'wcdm_skip_cart', 'yes' ); update_option( 'wcdm_fast_checkout', 'no' ); update_option( 'wcdm_editable_cart_price', 'yes' ); update_option( 'wcdm_disabled_coupon_field', 'yes' ); update_option( 'wcdm_disabled_order_note', 'yes' ); update_option( 'wcdm_disabled_tax', 'yes' ); update_option( 'wcdm_goal_behavior', 'continue' ); if ( class_exists( 'WC_Install' ) ) { WC_Install::create_pages(); } $campaign_id = wp_insert_post( array( 'post_type' => 'wcdm_campaigns', 'post_title' => 'Community Relief Fund', 'post_content' => '

Help fund emergency supplies, meals, and local support services for families who need immediate assistance.

', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'meta_input' => array( 'wcdm_goal_amount' => '5000', '_raised_amount' => '1850', '_end_date' => gmdate( 'Y-m-d', strtotime( '+90 days' ) ), 'wcdm_goal_behavior' => 'continue', ), ) ); if ( is_wp_error( $campaign_id ) || ! class_exists( 'WCDM_Donation_Product' ) ) { return; } $product = new WCDM_Donation_Product(); $product->set_name( 'Donate to the Community Relief Fund' ); $product->set_description( '

Choose a suggested amount or enter a custom donation to support this campaign.

' ); $product->set_status( 'publish' ); $product->set_catalog_visibility( 'visible' ); $product->set_regular_price( '25' ); $product->set_price( '25' ); $product->set_virtual( true ); $product->set_sold_individually( true ); $product->set_manage_stock( false ); $product->set_stock_status( 'instock' ); $product_id = $product->save(); if ( $product_id ) { wp_set_object_terms( $product_id, 'donation', 'product_type', false ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_campaign_id', $campaign_id ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_is_predefined_amounts', 'yes' ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_predefined_amounts_title', 'Suggested amounts' ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_predefined_amounts', array( '25', '50', '100' ) ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_is_custom_amount', 'yes' ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_amount_increment_steps', '1.00' ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_min_amount', '5' ); update_post_meta( $product_id, 'wcdm_max_amount', '1000' ); if ( function_exists( 'wc_delete_product_transients' ) ) { wc_delete_product_transients( $product_id ); } }
